actual_title: Computability and the Limits of Procedure

cards.title: Computability
cards.governance_note: Ask whether a procedure can exist in principle before asking whether it is efficient.

cards.title: Decidability
cards.governance_note: Separate always-halts yes/no decision from recognition, approximation, or assistance.

cards.title: Undecidability
cards.governance_note: Do not treat more data, compute, or AI as dissolving mathematical limits of procedure.

cards.title: Automation Limits
cards.governance_note: State what the system cannot decide and preserve paths for unresolved or high-stakes cases.
